Name: Fable Log
Tagline: Flexible logging wrapper with six severity levels and extensible output streams
Icon:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">
		<defs>
			<clipPath id="frame-fable-log-filled-light">
				<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z"/>
			</clipPath>
		</defs>
		<path d="M 2 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 94 48
			A 46 46 0 1 0 2 48 Z" fill="#db6a2e"/>
		<g clip-path="url(#frame-fable-log-filled-light)"><circle cx="48" cy="48" r="14" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)"/><path d="M 51.74 79.78 A 32 32 0 0 1 20.49 64.34" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M 18.61 35.35 A 32 32 0 0 1 47.61 16.00" fill="none" stroke="#68a8bd" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M 73.65 28.87 A 32 32 0 0 1 75.91 63.66" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/></g>
		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"
			font-family="-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif"
			font-size="38" font-weight="700"
			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">FL</text>
	</svg>
